title: Workout History Record
description: One completed workout AS ACTUALLY PERFORMED. One file per workout, named history/YYYY-MM-DD-<focus>.json. Written by the desktop session after Austin pastes his 'Copy my workout summary' block from the artifact. This is the source of truth for programming the next session; the artifact only ever holds the current planned workout.

date.description: ISO date the workout was performed, YYYY-MM-DD. ALWAYS present.

format.description: Primary training format of the session.

duration_min.description: Total session minutes if captured; null if not.

exercises.description: Every exercise attempted, in order, as completed.

id.description: exercise_library.json id if it maps to a known exercise; null if ad-hoc.

sets.description: One entry per set actually performed (after any tap-to-edit).

reps.description: Reps done, or seconds for a timed hold (see is_timed).

weight_lb.description: Working weight in pounds; null for bodyweight.

is_timed.description: True when reps field represents seconds held.

skipped.description: True if the exercise was skipped entirely.

note.description: Optional per-exercise note (e.g. 'right shoulder twinged on set 3').

skips.description: Names/ids of exercises or blocks skipped, for quick scanning.

feel_note.description: Optional overall feel note Austin adds (energy, appetite, shoulder, mood).
